meta.title: AI In Production in OT, Today, Right Now, Not In The Future
meta.description: Clint Bodungen gives real world examples in as much technical detail as you can cram into 30 minutes. This is one of the few AI in OT presentations, and even cybersecurity in general, that is not big picture, hand wavy.
